title: Marketplace Manager - Droom Ventures Solutions - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Droom Ventures Solutions - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
Join the Droom Ventures Solutions family as a Marketplace Manager in Srinagar. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Droom Ventures Solutions:
Droom Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Shopify

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Droom Ventures Solutions!
